description: MCP configuration for TORQ Chrome Bridge integration with Claude Code
install_instructions: 2. Update paths to match your system

environment_variables.CHROME_BRIDGE_API_KEY: API key for authentication (optional but recommended)
environment_variables.CHROME_BRIDGE_REQUIRE_APPROVAL: Require approval for browser actions (default: true)
environment_variables.RAILWAY_DEPLOY_URL: Railway deployment URL for verification hooks
environment_variables.VERCEL_DEPLOY_URL: Vercel deployment URL for verification hooks
